falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above a major trendline would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average on any single day within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate strong market conviction, contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing a clear directional bias.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX Volatility Index drops below 20 (indicating extreme complacency) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a level would contradict the 'blowoff score' of 40, suggesting volatility is dissipating rather than escalating, invalidating the current pattern match.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
